feature_history.name: Self-Registration Protocol

feature_history.name: Silent Classification
feature_history.description: User roles (user/admin) are hidden from everyone except the system admin.

feature_history.name: Holographic Chat UI

feature_history.name: Neural Faith Hub
feature_history.description: Integrated Quran (Audio/Reading), Azkar, and Haptic Tasbih with Smart Cache.

feature_history.name: Neural Admin Console

feature_history.name: Market Oversight (Audit)

feature_history.name: Financial Pulsar
feature_history.description: Global transaction monitoring for system credit liquidity oversight.

feature_history.name: App Launcher & Sandbox
